name: Ripple
description: Raindrop rings widening on still water — every redraw lands new drops and sets the circles spreading from rest.

code.style: --ro: @rand(0.45, 0.95); --rule: ( /* both rings share one emitted ink so the ripple reads as one event */ --rk: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(4%, 16%); border: calc(50px / @Y) solid @var(--rk); border-radius: @rand(46%, 54%); opacity: var(--ro); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(30%, 42%); border: calc(50px / @Y) solid @var(--rk); border-radius: @rand(46%, 54%); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
